sentences.text: 16.1 Why hasn't he gone to college?
options: He wasn't ready to start higher education
He couldn't afford the tuition fees.
He didn't get good enough grades
sentences.answer: He wasn't ready to start higher education

sentences.text: 16.2 Why did he decide to travel for 2 years?
options: To avoid studying.
To gain life experience.
To travelling.
sentences.answer: To gain life experience.

question: Topic: A book about a life of a scientist

sentences.text: 17.1 Why do many readers find the book interesting?
options: It uses simple language to describe complex ideas.
It relies heavily on technical vocabulary.
It avoids explaining abstract concepts.
sentences.answer: It uses simple language to describe complex ideas.

sentences.text: 17.2 Why is the book so popular?
options: It is too difficult to understand.
It is too long.
It is similar to the previous book about the scientist.
sentences.answer: It is similar to the previous book about the scientist.

sentences.text: 16.1 What is this person's opinion on sports?
options: They have a harmful effect
They bring people together
They improve concentration
sentences.answer: They have a harmful effect

sentences.text: 16.2 What is the importance of sports for students?
options: It distracts students from studying.
It is only useful for professional athletes.
It helps balance student's lives.
sentences.answer: It helps balance student's lives.

sentences.text: 17.1 Why is this series so popular?
options: It has the consistent quality throughout.
It was only available for a short time.
It features unknown actors.
sentences.answer: It has the consistent quality throughout.

sentences.text: 17.2 What is the current series industry affected by?
options: Viewer habits influence the way that series are made.
Series are no longer produced for online platforms.
Actors now write most of the scripts themselves.
sentences.answer: Viewer habits influence the way that series are made.

sentences.text: 16.1 What is the importance of advertising?
options: It can help reach new customers
It increases the product price
It can build brand recognition
sentences.answer: It can help reach new customers

sentences.text: 16.2 Why shouldn't we sponsor sports tournaments?
options: They can create unfair competition
They are too expensive
They can generate negative publicity for the sport
sentences.answer: They can generate negative publicity for the sport

sentences.text: 17.1 What do these two famous writers have in common?
options: They both make references to each other in their work
They both wrote in the same genre
They both were born in the same country
sentences.answer: They both make references to each other in their work

sentences.text: 17.2 What is special about their works?
options: Their works are all based on real events
The meaning of their work is not always easily identified
They use simple language and structure
sentences.answer: The meaning of their work is not always easily identified

sentences.text: 16.1 Why do residents oppose this plan?
options: It doesn't do enough to promote alternatives to driving
It increases the number of public parks in the area
It provides free public transportation for all residents
sentences.answer: It doesn't do enough to promote alternatives to driving

sentences.text: 16.2 What difficulties is the city council having with this plan?
options: The plan is not making efficient use of existing land
There is too much public support, making it hard to manage expectations
The plan has already exceeded its budget by a large margin
sentences.answer: The plan is not making efficient use of existing land

sentences.text: 17.1 What should students do when choosing a career?
options: Focus only on the salary offered
Be flexible and open minded
Choose the same career as their friends
sentences.answer: Be flexible and open minded

sentences.text: 17.2 What should students pay attention to when applying for jobs these days?
options: They are becoming more competitive
Most jobs no longer require any qualifications
Companies prefer handwritten applications
sentences.answer: They are becoming more competitive

sentences.text: 16.1 How should people feel about cameras in the workplace?
options: Cameras should be banned
People should feel uneasy
Employees probably worry unnecessarily
sentences.answer: Employees probably worry unnecessarily

sentences.text: 16.2 How should people feel about cameras in general?
options: People should feel reassured
People should feel paranoid
Cameras invade personal space
sentences.answer: People should feel reassured

question: Topic: A new novel of a famous writer

sentences.text: 17.1 What is special about his new novel?
options: It is shorter and easier to read
It is quite different compared to his previous works
It has been written in a different genre
sentences.answer: It is quite different compared to his previous works

sentences.text: 17.2 What is the speaker's opinion of this writer?
options: He should listen to the critics before writing next novel
He is a brilliant but slow writer
He needs to change his writing style
sentences.answer: He should listen to the critics before writing next novel

sentences.text: 16.1 What will this musician do in the near future?
options: He plans to release a new album
He will probably retire from singing
He wants to collaborate with younger artists
sentences.answer: He will probably retire from singing

sentences.text: 16.2 What does the speaker think about his career in general?
options: He regrets choosing his profession
He could have been more successful
He believes he reached the peak too early
sentences.answer: He could have been more successful

sentences.text: 17.1 What is the advantage of this new guide?
options: It includes detailed hotel reviews
It creates a sense of adventure
It focuses mainly on luxury travel
sentences.answer: It creates a sense of adventure

sentences.text: 17.2 What is the limitation of this new guide?
options: It is only suitable for a particular generation
It is too expensive for most travelers
It doesn’t cover popular tourist attractions
sentences.answer: It is only suitable for a particular generation

sentences.text: 16.1 How has this research into happiness been responded to?
options: It has led to immediate changes in government policy
It has been completely ignored by the public
It has not been accurately reported by the media
sentences.answer: It has not been accurately reported by the media

sentences.text: 16.2 What is the speaker's opinion on this research in general?
options: The researchers are biased in their approach
The research has already changed public attitudes
The research is unlikely to find a conclusive answer
sentences.answer: The research is unlikely to find a conclusive answer

question: Topic: Criticism of the new novel

sentences.text: 17.1 What attracts readers to this novel?
options: The characters were interesting
The book includes detailed historical facts
The chapters are very short and easy to read
sentences.answer: The characters were interesting

sentences.text: 17.2 What is the speaker's opinion about this novel?
options: It will establish the author's popularity
It needs major editing before publication
It’s unlikely to appeal to international readers
sentences.answer: It will establish the author's popularity

sentences.text: 16.1 What helps writers focus more on writing?
options: Work in noisy environments
Create dedicated periods
Rely entirely on inspiration
sentences.answer: Create dedicated periods

sentences.text: 16.2 What is a common mistake writers make when generating ideas?
options: Spending too much time researching grammar rules
Writing ideas only in digital format
Refusing to seek the advice of other people
sentences.answer: Refusing to seek the advice of other people

sentences.text: 17.1 How is professionalism demonstrated at work?
options: Avoid giving feedback to colleagues
Always agree with your manager
Maintain the positive attitude
sentences.answer: Maintain the positive attitude

sentences.text: 17.2 What is the public's view of current professionalism?
options: Reduce opportunities for remote work
Change its definition
Increase working hours
sentences.answer: Change its definition

sentences.text: 16.1 How does creating each small plan help you?
options: They help you make decisions
They increase your workload
They delay overall progress
sentences.answer: They help you make decisions

sentences.text: 16.2 How does creating a plan help you in general?
options: It removes all risks from the process
It requires you to set yourself certain limits
It guarantees immediate success
sentences.answer: It requires you to set yourself certain limits

question: Topic: A promotion campaign for a product

sentences.text: 17.1 What do people think about this promotion campaign?
options: It is making exaggerated claims
It is being ignored completely
It is too simple to be effective
sentences.answer: It is making exaggerated claims

sentences.text: 17.2 What does the speaker think about this campaign?
options: It costs too much to make to be profitable
It is reaching the wrong audience
It lacks creativity
sentences.answer: It costs too much to make to be profitable

sentences.text: 16.1 What is the speaker's opinion on this script?
options: The dialogue is too complex for viewers
The setting feels too unrealistic
The characters' background are not adequately explored
sentences.answer: The characters' background are not adequately explored

sentences.text: 16.2 How do industries impact script production?
options: They provide more creative freedom to writers
The new industry demands have a negative influence.
They increase audience engagement significantly
sentences.answer: The new industry demands have a negative influence.

sentences.text: 17.1 How is this restaurant reviewed by customers?
options: The food was too exotic for locals
The location is difficult to find
The standard of service wasn’t good
sentences.answer: The standard of service wasn’t good

sentences.text: 17.2 What should this restaurant do?
options: They need to make the customers feel valued and welcome
They should increase their prices for profit
They need to focus only on online orders
sentences.answer: They need to make the customers feel valued and welcome

sentences.text: 16.1 How does she feel about working from home?
options: It wasn't as good as she expected
It gave her more free time than expected
It helped her become more productive
sentences.answer: It wasn't as good as she expected

sentences.text: 16.2 What is her opinion on working from home in general?
options: It depends on your situation and personality
It's better than working in an office for everyone
It should be avoided whenever possible
sentences.answer: It depends on your situation and personality

sentences.text: 17.1 What should you do to better control your short-term spending?
options: Monitor your spending for a weekly plan
Avoid all unnecessary purchases entirely
Use only cash instead of cards
sentences.answer: Monitor your spending for a weekly plan

sentences.text: 17.2 What should you do to better control your long-term spending?
options: Seek advice from someone who have experience
Stop spending on entertainment altogether
Track every single expense daily
sentences.answer: Seek advice from someone who have experience

sentences.text: 16.1 What is the way to have a good sleep according to the speaker?
options: Sleeping fewer hours increases deep sleep quality
Drinking coffee before bed helps relax the mind
Blocking out noise and light is key
sentences.answer: Blocking out noise and light is key

sentences.text: 16.2 What is the speaker's view on insomnia in general?
options: People can't always recognize the symptoms of tiredness
Most people with insomnia actually sleep too much
Insomnia is caused only by physical health problems
sentences.answer: People can't always recognize the symptoms of tiredness

sentences.text: 16.1 When did she become a Nutritionist?
options: When she did a biology degree.
After working in a hospital.
When she worked at a healthcare center.
sentences.answer: When she did a biology degree.

sentences.text: 16.2 When did she become famous?
options: After solving people's problems in a helpline.
After appearing on a famous TV show.
After inventing a new type of food.
sentences.answer: After solving people's problems in a helpline.

sentences.text: 17.1 What is the speaker's advice?
options: Be well informed of the places you are going to visit.
Always carry extra water and food supplies.
Avoid cycling on rough terrain.
sentences.answer: Be well informed of the places you are going to visit.

sentences.text: 17.2 What is the speaker's advice in general?
options: Knowing the people and cultures in the different countries.
Only visit places with good weather conditions.
Cycle at your own pace without worrying about the destination.
sentences.answer: Knowing the people and cultures in the different countries.
